title: Hormozi - Perfect Sam (Workshop)
transcript: Let's say like within your business. Let's say that you could find the perfect Sam. The perfect Sam that you could hire and whatever you could pay the perfect Sam to do, and he could do everything you can do just as well as you can. So whatever your current profit is minus Sam's compensation, if you could do that, then you would have almost the same amount of money you have now, and maybe in two years, perfect Sam would grow the pie so that you're making the same or more than you're making right now, but you're still not working at all. And so if that's the case, then it's like we're always in the hypothetic world, we're one hirer away from somebody who could do 100% of what we're currently doing and the business would be able to continue to grow. And so that's what we walked through at our scaling workshop here at my headquarters in Vegas. And so if you're at all interested in being surrounded by business owners that are like you or even bigger in this specific industry, then I'd love to invite you out. So click book a call and if it's a fit, can't wait to meet you.

hook.text: Let's say that you could find the perfect Sam.

sections.name: Thought experiment
sections.summary: Imaginate que encontrás a alguien que hace todo lo que vos hacés

sections.name: Insight
sections.summary: Siempre estamos a UN hire de libertad total

sections.name: Workshop invite
sections.summary: Eso es lo que hacemos en el workshop en Vegas

structure.rehook_text: we're one hirer away from somebody who could do 100% of what we're currently doing

key_phrases: surrounded by business owners like you or even bigger

cta.text: click book a call and if it's a fit, can't wait to meet you

analysis.emotional_arc: Experimento mental (imaginá al Sam perfecto) → revelación (estás a un hire de distancia) → invitación a resolver eso
strengths: Thought experiment como hook es único y enganchador
Concepto 'Perfect Sam' es memorable y compartible
patterns_to_replicate: Patrón THOUGHT EXPERIMENT: en vez de decir el problema, hacer que el viewer lo descubra solo a través de un ejercicio mental
Nombrar un concepto ('Perfect Sam') para hacerlo memorable y referenciable
Vender el resultado (libertad) no el producto (workshop)
